sample_rows.Claim: Democracy should be done away with.
sample_rows.Evidence: Amartya Sen, an Indian economist and Nobel laureate, has contended that countries with democratic governance and a free media have almost never experienced prolonged famines [REF].

Polygamy, in any form, leads to social structures that restrict and weaken social freedom and democracy. Western history has taught us that true democratic self-governance starts within the monogamous family.
